ocr_findings.description: The radar chart (spider chart) showing 5-subject scores (国語, 数学, 英語, 理科, 社会) with axis labels is replaced by an image placeholder. The chart's axis labels and data values are lost, but the surrounding text explains its purpose.
The 'グラフを使い分ける' callout box text is present in OCR as a standalone section heading rather than as a box inset — minor formatting difference.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 01-05 opening page on 業務分析と業務計画. The lesson title, introductory text, and the パレート図とABC分析 section with full explanatory paragraphs are well-captured. The radar chart graphic is an image and its internal labels are unavoidably lost. The ABC analysis example text (Aグループ/Bグループ/Cグループ classifications) is fully and accurately reproduced.
